name: Roblox_Studio
description: Official Roblox Studio MCP server (built into Studio). Enables the IA to read the game data model, inspect instances, execute Luau code, run playtests, and capture screen. WRITE operations (multi_edit, generate_*, insert_from_creator_store) are blocked by robloxMcpGuard — the IA must use aplicar_diff instead, which goes through Bug Hunter + DataGuard + read-before-write + rollback.
notes: This MCP server is BUILT INTO Roblox Studio (no separate install needed).
The user must enable it in Studio: Assistant > ... > Manage MCP Servers > Enable.
Claude-Killer auto-starts the MCP server when mode Roblox is active.
WRITE tools are blocked by robloxMcpGuard.ts for safety.
